mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_CATEGORY_NO AS "boardCategory", BOARD_CATEGORY FROM BOARD_TYPE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_DELETE = 'N' AND BOARD_CD_NO = #{boardCdNo}
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
